title: Magnetic Drawing Board Toy for Kids Age 3-7 Years, Erasable Doodle Board with 4 Colors, Educational Travel Learning Toy, Birthday Gift for 3 4 5 Year Old Girls & Boys (Yellow)
features: Vibrant 4-Colour Drawing Board: This yellow magnetic doodle board replaces messy crayons and paper with 4 bright erasable colours. Children aged 2-7 can freely draw, write, or use included stamps for creative play anytime – ideal for home, travel, and zero-cleanup art.

Early Educational Development Tool: Designed as an engaging learning toy for toddlers 2-5 years old, it builds artistic imagination, concentration, and fine motor skills. The reusable board encourages repeated practice of letters, numbers, and shapes through play-based learning.

Child-Safe & Durable Construction: Made with non-toxic ABS plastic and BPA-free magnetic ink, our drawing board features rounded edges and meets strict CPC safety standards. A secure pen/stamp storage design prevents choking hazards for young kids.

Effortless Erase & Portable Fun: Glide the eraser bar for instant clean restarts. The lightweight build with carry handle makes it a perfect travel toy for cars, planes, or restaurants – keeping children occupied anywhere without mess.

Perfect Gift for Young Artists: A thoughtful birthday or Christmas gift for 2-7 year old girls and boys. This educational toy sparks creativity while reducing screen time, making it a parent-approved present for toddlers and preschoolers.
description: Product Description Child Development Draw, write, and play games on the erasable sketch pad using the stylus to develop your child’s creativity and practice coordination. Also, it helps your child to learn numbers and letters. Colorful Magnetic Drawing Board The drawing board is designed with 4 light colors: green, blue, yellow, and red, each in its own color zone. The drawing board is coupled with the 4 geometric stamps, fully satisfies children's imagination, enabling them to explore their creativity. Suitable Size for Kids The drawing board has a frame size of 13"x 9.5".This toy is a great gift for kids on occasions like birthdays, Thanksgiving Day, Easter Day, Christmas Day, and other special occasions.
